rationale: Gov't Code §2001.175 governs judicial review procedures for contested agency cases. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b); no conflict exists.
quote: The procedures of this section apply if the manner of review authorized by law for the decision in a contested case that is the subject of complaint is other than by trial de novo.
_note: Rule concerns APA judicial review procedure; proposed statutory dollar-amount change to Tax Code §11.13(b) has no interaction with this provision.
